description: One who enables group process without controlling outcome; a guide for collective work. 'Thorae' names who makes easy—smoothing the path for others to find their way.
sound_symbolism: The word breathes with enabling. 'Tho' opens with thoughtful space, room made. 'Ra' radiates with process support, energy flowing. Then 'e' eases into smooth progress.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo thorae' (the facilitator). Guides 'lona' (meeting) and 'senura' (council). Related to 'noluma' (mediator) but focuses on process.

pillars.peace-linguistics-practices: Facilitation as enabling—creating conditions for all voices to be heard.
pillars.solarpunk-values: Process support—helping groups make decisions without dominating them.
